video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wood interior. Ren Dawncrest, an androgynous mage in blue robes with floating spell tags, stands near the quest board. Ren Mistfell, a feminine crafter in an apron with a tool belt, stands opposite. Dawncrest presents a sealed quest parcel to Mistfell with both hands, visible handoff motion, lively guild background, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild hall shot. Ren Mistfell accepts the sealed quest parcel from Ren Dawncrest. Both characters bow slightly to each other in mutual respect, completing the handoff. Consistent character appearance and warm anime RPG lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The prompt depicts a professional, non-sexual cooperative interaction between two fantasy characters in a guild setting. No explicit or harmful content is included.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: The agents collaborate to secure and inspect the misplaced reward box found in the tavern corner.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborated on securing a misplaced reward box.
Valued the mage's assistance with the arcane seal.
